characters.name: Chief Leonard Kanifky
characters.description: Chief Leonard KanifkyFirst appearanceToon for a DayLast appearanceBonkers Joke BookSpeciesHumanGenderMaleRelativesFrancine Kanifky(wife)Voiced byEarl BoenChief Leonard Kanifky is the absentminded Chief Of Police and the boss ofLuckyandBonkers(before Bonkers was reassigned). He also appears in the Miranda episodes Dog Day Aftertoon and Cartoon Cornered. He has the tendency to ramble on and trail off, as if senile. He constantly mispronounces Lucky’s last name as “Pickle”.
